1851690.name: Blood Bay: Card History
1851690.description:
Blood Bay: Card History – This is a fairy tale ballad in the genre of card games.

In ancient times, when dragons burned villages, and pirates - ships ... When unconquered magic wandered the earth and the life of every person hung by a thread ... There was at that time a kingdom called the Archipelago, because it stood on a handful of islands in the Shark Sea . Difficult times overtook the kingdom after the death of the king: wars, famines, illnesses... The young, excited prince decided to put an end to this and went to the northern lands shrouded in mystery in search of treasures. And he happened to meet a demon there and he concluded a contract with him. Now the life of the kingdom depended only on him...

Walk the path of the prince by choosing options for action!

Peculiarities:

  • You have to make a wise (and sometimes not very) choice that will determine the fate of the kingdom!

  • Colorful 2D graphics, hundreds of different cards!

  • Card narration of the plot and story!
1851690.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 乌克兰语
